summary: Adjusted the opening to use a place-led construction distinct from the neighboring chapter's temporal arrival opening while preserving the same situation and tone, and clarified the final launch line toward Halcote to smooth the handoff into chapter 13.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph around the pilgrim hut's physical condition instead of a matching time-led scaffold.
Preserved the second-night-after-the-fire timing and Nami's infected-hand imagery in the revised opening.
Added Halcote direction to the final ferry launch line for cleaner exit continuity into the next chapter.
